title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su demonstrates a workspace architecture for Claude that includes instruction files, persistent memory, and a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects. The system turns Claude into a full operating system for work management with templates and toolkits available through Cowork Academy.
